entry.value:
[["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","__NEW_AGENT__","o|","manual","b|F","a|","a|8","id","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","2026-02-19T22:33:40.926Z","claude-sonnet-4-5","isAgentConversation","a|V","b|T","o|W|X","n|0","0b554d75-d7e3-4c10-a6b0-c5fc517927b3","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","status","a|b|c|d","Create a comprehensive technical specification document (Fachkonzept) for a ChatGPT clone application with the following architecture and technology stack:

**Frontend:**
- React (specify latest stable version)
- Material-UI (MUI) v7 for UI components
- Responsive design for web browsers

**Backend:**
- Python FastAPI framework
- RESTful API design
- WebSocket support for real-time chat streaming

**AI/ML Integration:**
- Microsoft Foundry for AI model deployment and management
- GPT-4o mini as the language model
- Streaming responses for chat interactions

**Infrastructure & Deployment:**
- Azure Container Apps for hosting both frontend and backend
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Bicep templates
- Cloud-native architecture following 12-factor app principles
- Containerization with Docker

**The specification should include:**
1. System architecture diagram showing component interactions
2. API endpoint definitions (REST and WebSocket)
3. Data models and database schema (if applicable)
4. Authentication and authorization strategy
5. Deployment pipeline and CI/CD workflow
6. Scalability and performance considerations
7. Security best practices
8. Cost optimization strategies for Azure resources
9. Monitoring and logging approach

**Project structure:**
- Organize as a monorepo or separate repositories for frontend/backend
- Follow Python best practices (PEP 8, PEP 257)
- Use relative imports and maintain clean project structure
- Include comprehensive documentation in English

Provide the specification in a structured format with clear sections, diagrams where appropriate, and implementation guidelines.","type","content","a|g|h","doc","paragraph","text","a|g|l","Create a comprehensive technical specification document (Fachkonzept) for a ChatGPT clone application with the following architecture and technology stack:","o|m|l|n","a|g","hardBreak","o|p|q","**Frontend:**","o|m|l|s","- React (specify latest stable version)","o|m|l|u","- Material-UI (MUI) v7 for UI components","o|m|l|w","- Responsive design for web browsers","o|m|l|y","**Backend:**","o|m|l|10","- Python FastAPI framework","o|m|l|12","- RESTful API design","o|m|l|14","- WebSocket support for real-time chat streaming","o|m|l|16","**AI/ML Integration:**","o|m|l|18","- Microsoft Foundry for AI model deployment and management","o|m|l|1A","- GPT-4o mini as the language model","o|m|l|1C","- Streaming responses for chat interactions","o|m|l|1E","**Infrastructure & Deployment:**","o|m|l|1G","- Azure Container Apps for hosting both frontend and backend","o|m|l|1I","- Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Bicep templates","o|m|l|1K","- Cloud-native architecture following 12-factor app principles","o|m|l|1M","- Containerization with Docker","o|m|l|1O","**The specification should include:**","o|m|l|1Q","1. System architecture diagram showing component interactions","o|m|l|1S","2. API endpoint definitions (REST and WebSocket)","o|m|l|1U","3. Data models and database schema (if applicable)","o|m|l|1W","4. Authentication and authorization strategy","o|m|l|1Y","5. Deployment pipeline and CI/CD workflow","o|m|l|1a","6. Scalability and performance considerations","o|m|l|1c","7. Security best practices","o|m|l|1e","8. Cost optimization strategies for Azure resources","o|m|l|1g","9. Monitoring and logging approach","o|m|l|1i","**Project structure:**","o|m|l|1k","- Organize as a monorepo or separate repositories for frontend/backend","o|m|l|1m","- Follow Python best practices (PEP 8, PEP 257)","o|m|l|1o","- Use relative imports and maintain clean project structure","o|m|l|1q","- Include comprehensive documentation in English","o|m|l|1s","Provide the specification in a structured format with clear sections, diagrams where appropriate, and implementation guidelines.","o|m|l|1u","a|o|r|r|t|r|v|r|x|r|z|r|r|11|r|13|r|15|r|17|r|r|19|r|1B|r|1D|r|1F|r|r|1H|r|1J|r|1L|r|1N|r|1P|r|r|1R|r|1T|r|1V|r|1X|r|1Z|r|1b|r|1d|r|1f|r|1h|r|1j|r|r|1l|r|1n|r|1p|r|1r|r|1t|r|r|1v","o|i|k|1w","a|1x","o|i|j|1y","draft","o|e|f|1z|20","o|S|8|T|T|U|C|B|B|Y|Z|a|9|C|9|21","o|D|22","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|24|25","o|26|B|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|23|27"],"28"]
